title: AXRegexValidationRule
description: Validation rule class that validates values against regular expressions.

types.title: AXRegexValidationRule

props.name: options
props.description: Configuration options for the regex validation rule.

types.description: Validation rule that uses regular expressions to validate string values against specific patterns.

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Validates that the value matches the specified regular expression pattern.

methods.name: validateAsync
methods.description: Asynchronously validates that the value matches the specified regular expression pattern.

methods.name: setPattern
methods.description: Sets a new regular expression pattern for validation.

methods.name: getPattern
methods.description: Returns the current regular expression pattern.
